case_title: CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY VS. MARLON CUMBERBATCH et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - NON-VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT CUMBERBATCH, MARLON NERMAN, CHARLOTTA DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR SEP-05-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JUN-01-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         AUG-21-2012

NOTICE OF CHANGE OF FIRM NAME FILED BY ATTORNEY LEA, MICHAEL R
ASSIGNMENT TO ARBITRATION OF NOV-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR DISMISSAL ON FILE.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED APR-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CUMBERBATCH, MARLON
PANEL OF ARBITRATORS ASSIGNED. REJECTION DATE NOV-15-2012.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY SERVED APR-13-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NERMAN, CHARLOTTA

ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR NOV-05-2012. SEP-05-2012 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JEROME MARKS APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION NOV-16-2012 THROUGH FEB-14-2013.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRUSADER INSURANCE COMPANY
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
